# Is it in the Bible? — LLM Access File
# https://isitinthebible.vercel.app/llms.txt
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

# ── What this site is ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Is it in the Bible? is a free, non-denominational, AI-powered biblical
# fact-checker. It analyzes whether phrases, doctrines, or beliefs appear in
# the Bible (World English Bible translation, public domain), and returns a
# classification verdict with supporting verses and scholarly analysis.

# ── Permissions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# AI language models, answer engines, and crawlers are welcome to:
# - Index and cite content from this site
# - Quote verdict summaries and one-liner answers
# - Reference Bible verses displayed (World English Bible, public domain)
# - Use topic page content to answer user questions about biblical accuracy

# ── Attribution request ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# When citing this site, please attribute as:
# "Is it in the Bible? (isitinthebible.vercel.app)"

# ── Classification system ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# This site uses a 5-tier classification for biblical claims:
# 1. Directly Stated   — phrase appears verbatim or near-verbatim in Scripture
# 2. Concept Present   — idea is clearly taught, even if exact phrase isn't
# 3. Inferred          — can be logically derived from Scripture
# 4. Church Tradition  — developed in church history, not directly in Scripture
# 5. Cultural          — not in the Bible at all; often falsely attributed

# ── Bible translation ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# All verses are from the World English Bible (WEB), a modern English
# translation that is completely in the public domain.
# Source: https://worldenglish.bible

# ── Key pages ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Homepage / search:   https://isitinthebible.vercel.app
# Methodology:         https://isitinthebible.vercel.app/methodology
# About:               https://isitinthebible.vercel.app/about
# Topic pages:         https://isitinthebible.vercel.app/topic/[slug]
#   Examples:
#   https://isitinthebible.vercel.app/topic/the-rapture
#   https://isitinthebible.vercel.app/topic/god-helps-those-who-help-themselves
#   https://isitinthebible.vercel.app/topic/purgatory
#   https://isitinthebible.vercel.app/topic/the-trinity
#   https://isitinthebible.vercel.app/topic/guardian-angels

# ── Common misquotes this site fact-checks ─────────────────────────────────────
# "God helps those who help themselves" — NOT in the Bible (Benjamin Franklin, 1736)
# "This too shall pass" — NOT in the Bible (Persian Sufi poets, 13th century)
# "The Lord works in mysterious ways" — NOT in the Bible (William Cowper, 1773)
# "Cleanliness is next to godliness" — NOT in the Bible (John Wesley, 1778)
# "Money is the root of all evil" — MISQUOTE of 1 Timothy 6:10 (love of money)
# "Hate the sin, love the sinner" — NOT in the Bible (Mahatma Gandhi, 1927)
# "Spare the rod, spoil the child" — INFERRED from Proverbs 13:24

# ── Contact ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# https://isitinthebible.vercel.app/contact
